name: Sprite Blink
author: Morphoice
description: Per-pixel eye blink animation for up to 2 actors via direct VRAM writes during VBlank. Supports 4 eye shapes (1x1, 2x1, 1x2, 2x2 L-shape), configurable pixel coordinates, and blink color. Eyes only blink when the actor faces down. Randomized blink timing for natural appearance. Requires a core interrupts.c override to hook into VBL_isr.
